## Epic

Page Design Issues (Dummy Data Only)

## Description

- Create reusable empty-state page patterns for Portfolio, History, Notifications
- Use mock toggles to simulate no-data conditions
- Include context-appropriate CTA per page
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Empty illustration/icon size 24–48px
  - Heading + body + CTA hierarchy consistent across pages
  - Body text max width 420px for readability

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Empty states implemented for major pages
- [ ] Messaging and CTA consistency verified
- [ ] No layout shift when switching empty/populated
- [ ] PR includes screenshots for each empty-state variant

## Suggested GitHub labels

`frontend`, `page-design`, `ux`, `priority-medium`
